name: obsidian-python-bridge
description: 🐍 A plugin that lets you write plugins in Python! Yes, it's as crazy as it sounds!

scripts.version: bun version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.validate: eslint . --ext .ts --fix && prettier --write "**/*.{ts,js,json,md,css}" && uv run ruff format . && uv run ruff check --fix . && tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck

author: mathe00
